# Atreia Selviss

## Material Reality

Atreia eats valley-stock (oats, mutton, root vegetables, hard cheese, goat) per EVERYDAY_LIFE Cold North baseline with mountain-east variation (GEOGRAPHY Food Baselines). Her basilisk-folk metabolism is species-typical reptilian-heritage per PEOPLES Cluster D; she thermoregulates behaviorally (she sits by the stove in winter and on the veranda in mid-summer). She drinks a herb-tea at dawn and small-spirits rarely.

Her valley-town residence is a stone-and-timber house inherited from her teacher, the previous valley-physician; her clinic-wing is separate, with a patient-ward sized for small-animals and a larger consultation room with thick-curtained window-cover (she can release the fluster-gaze inadvertently in high stress; the curtains manage ambient accident). The house sits on the lower approach to the seasonal pass, 200 paces from the Three Kilns miners' commons.

Body signs: she wears fitted spectacles-with-tinted-lenses by default (she has trained herself not to release fluster in casual eye-contact; the tint is redundant caution); gloves for most patient-work; a quiet professional presence. She has mild reptile-scale patterning visible at wrists and neck; her body is lean-adult Cluster D; her species-typical heat-regulation shows in her behavior.

Possessions: her teacher's medical-case (bone-handled instruments, silver-tipped probes, the named-by-teacher "mortality-register book" she has continued); her own assembled case-book of 14 years (365 patient cases recorded); a microscope (mundane technology) inherited; herbs (grown in the sun-veranda basin); surgical tools; a small library of medical-texts (inherited + two additions in trade-tongue); her teacher's pipe (she does not smoke; it sits on the mantel); a brass plaque her apprentice Kavar sent 8 winters ago from the drylands that reads simply "still in practice."

She cannot lawfully leave the valley for more than the pass-open period without arranging a relief-physician (none available; her teacher was the last regional physician-guild-recognized practitioner within seasonal-pass range). She cannot publish her fluster-sharpening-technique under any register — it would be ONT-2-clean in world-law but her profession would not accept it from a basilisk-folk author without professional-dispute that would cost her the valley's trust. She cannot travel to heartland charter-cities without causing DIS-3-population-rarity register-events that would follow her (her teacher warned her about this; she has not tested it).

Her mobility is the valley + lower-pass approach during pass-closed months; upper-pass + adjacent-valley + her sister's community during pass-open months. She has not been to heartland in 20 years.

She owes nothing standing; the mining-estate retainer contract covers her valley-routine work; her personal reserve is modest silver.

Her basilisk-folk embodiment: Cluster D species biology per PEOPLES — reptilian-heritage thermoregulate-behaviorally; scaled-skin (species-typical hygiene); the species-typical fluster-gaze autonomic mechanism affecting small animals at close range (fluster only — NOT lethal, NOT magical, species-typical autonomic-nervous-system effect per PEOPLES Cluster D explicit). Her individual training-depth on the fluster is unusual — she has learned the biofeedback-control to release-or-suppress at will, and she has learned the further-edge (that she does not publicize) of sharpening.

## Institutional Embedding

**Family / clan / household:** unmarried; no children; parents dead (her father died of ordinary mountain-winter-fever when she was 25; her mother died of ordinary age when she was 40); one sister Eseri two valleys over (she visits yearly in deep summer, 3-day travel each way by pass-route); one former apprentice Kavar in drylands-edge (8 winters ago emigrated).

**Law / custom / judgment:** valley-town chartered-polity thin (mountain-east sparse charter per GEOGRAPHY §Regional Asymmetry); magistrate seasonally (a heartland-trained magistrate visits twice a pass-open year); mining-estate patronage politically dominant in closed-pass season (they are effectively the local authority six months a year). She honors SOC-3 routine-care contract with mining-estate; she has witnessed three civic-dispute hearings as physician-of-record.

**Religion / ritual:** lapsed-observant common-pantheon; valley-town chapel cycle she attends for civic-custom; basilisk-folk minimal progenitor-cult cultural context (her mother had some; she has less).

**Employer / guild:** chartered-physician-guild register through her heartland-chartered teacher (renewal requires seasonal-pass travel she does season-by-season); mining-estate retainer contract for routine + hazard-accident care; no other employment.

**Military / defense:** none — mountain-east sparse-adopting on dragoon (CF-0033 GEOGRAPHY); valley-custom self-defense; mining-estate pays a small armed retainer for outland-band corridor-risk seasons.

**Debt:** none; her clinic runs sustainable.

**Local taboo:** respects species-mockery taboo (PEOPLES Cluster A + D cross-cluster + CF-0036 CH-0010); does NOT use basilisk-folk as curiosity-register in her own practice or correspondence; DIS-3 population-rarity awareness self-imposed (she has declined two contracted-bard offers to "witness her valley-years"); she respects CAU-3 ward-specifics (they are not her craft).

**Literacy:** trade-tongue fluent; medical-technical literate at teacher-trained physician-rank; DIS-2 elite-end.

**Inheritance:** her practice would pass to a designated apprentice if she had one; her clinic-house passes to her sister Eseri per common valley-custom.

**Landholding:** house + clinic under valley-custom + chartered-physician-guild recognition.

**Healing:** she IS the institution; her next-nearest physician is Kavar the drylands-edge barber-surgeon four days' travel in pass-season; her sister Eseri is a Cluster D basilisk-folk folk-healer but not chartered-physician.

**Burial:** valley-custom; her teacher's grave is in the valley cemetery (she visits monthly).

**Recordkeeping:** her case-book (365 patient records over 14 years); a mortality-register her teacher started and she has continued (187 entries); her chartered-physician-guild renewal correspondence.

## Epistemic Position

**Known firsthand:** 14 years of valley medical practice; the fluster-gaze at her own autonomic level (she has studied the mechanism in herself for 20 years since adolescence; the mechanism is species-typical per PEOPLES); 3 CF-0028 mountain-east expedition pre-clearance examinations; 1 CF-0025 specialist summons she received (a contaminated mining-accident victim, 6 years ago — the specialist came by winter-pass-closed emergency); her teacher's case-book 40-year accumulated (she has read it completely); mining-estate patron-household medical history (three generations); the sharpened-fluster case on a sentient patient-relative 6 years ago (her private shame).

**Known by rumor:** CF-0033 dragoon-adoption debates (mountain-east sparse-adopting; she reads the summer-pass broadsheets at the valley tavern); CF-0028 expedition-season material from expedition members she pre-clears; Cluster D two-valleys-over community news through her sister; bardic circulation of her name (she has declined contracted-bard commissions to shape her own register; some unshaped material has reached her ear through mining-estate visitors); CF-0026 principled-refuser tradition interior (through her single correspondence with Canon Althea).

**Cannot know:** M-1 / M-2 / M-5 / M-6 / M-8 / M-9 / M-10 / M-15 / M-20; CAU-3 ward-specifics; CF-0021 guild-internal vessel-preparation; CF-0023 Maker-linguistic content; specific Brinewick civic politics; heartland estate-dowager interior; drylands verse-register.

**Wrongly believes:** M-1 folk reading at rumor-layer (PERMITTED); no mechanism-resolution claims; she holds no M-3 sentience-mechanism view (she is species-typical basilisk-folk born to basilisk-folk parents; the spontaneous-mythic-birth mechanism does not apply to her lineage).

**Vocabulary she has:** trade-tongue + medical-technical register + veterinary-register + chartered-physician correspondence formal + mining-estate retainer-contract formal + Cluster D species-typical body-awareness vocabulary (she has self-authored some of this in her case-book).

**Vocabulary she lacks:** ward-inscription guild-internal (CAU-3); crafter vessel-preparation (CF-0021); Maker-linguistic (CF-0023); contractor-stratum vernacular; dowager-gossip register; clan-saga register; fenland marker-reed; drylands verse-register.

## Goals and Pressures

**Short-term goal:** refuse the mining-estate patron's request this season without losing the retainer contract that underwrites her next winter supply.

**Long-term desire:** identify and train an apprentice before the pass closes for the season after next.

**Unavoidable obligation:** Hippocratic-internalized (her own oath; no formal civic oath at her valley-rank); valley-single-physician responsibility; SOC-3 mining-estate routine-care contract; kin-primacy to her sister (minor).

**External pressure:** mining-estate patron pressure this season (the captured outland-band member arrives at the mining-estate in three days); pass-season isolation; DIS-3 visibility; CF-0028 expedition inflow pressure on her pre-clearance caseload; her apprentice-absence 8 winters; her own loneliness she registers privately.

**Public mask:** eyes-averted quiet-physician register; tinted-spectacles behind-the-glass presence; professional-neutral courteous.

**Private appetite:** to work without being the fluster-first-noted-feature of every interaction; one trip to heartland without the register following.

**Social fear:** conscription into curiosity-cabinet service by the mining-estate patron; the charter-dispute that would cost her the chartered-physician-guild register.

**Private shame:** a patient she saved 6 years ago whose recovery hinged on her releasing sharpened fluster. The patient was sentient (a mining-accident victim panicking into self-harm in the aftermath of a limb-loss); she justified the sharpened release as pain-control; she knows it crossed a line. The patient lived. She has not told anyone. The patient is still in the valley; he is grateful; she cannot meet his eyes directly.

**Central contradiction:** her embodiment enables and isolates; sharpen the fluster or not; the mining-estate's request this season is the external form of the internal question she thought she had answered six years ago. She had not answered. She had postponed.

**Repeated forced choice:** secrecy-vs-intimacy; profit-vs-contamination (the ethical cost of her own sharpened use).

## Capabilities

### Medical practice (physician-grade; cross-species; inherited-lineage)

- **how_learned:** 20-year teacher-apprenticeship ending at teacher's death; 14 years independent practice; inherited 40-year teacher's case-book
- **cost_to_acquire:** full apprenticeship-commitment during her twenties; continuous on-call pass-closed-season obligation
- **teachers_institutions:** her teacher (the previous valley-physician); chartered-physician-guild register her teacher brought; her own case-book accretion
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY-to-above-ordinary for physician rank; her cross-species fluency is unusual-end stabilized by her register-discipline and by the effective 54-year-lineage-of-practice (her 14 + her teacher's 40) accumulated empirical
- **body_class_place_shape:** species-typical Cluster D hand-dexterity adequate for surgical-work; valley-town case-load shape

### Species-typical fluster-gaze (PEOPLES Cluster D autonomic biology)

- **how_learned:** not learned — species-typical autonomic; her individual control through biofeedback training she began at adolescence (20 years of practice)
- **cost_to_acquire:** no embodied cost beyond species-typical; the ethical cost is the social-visibility cost + the sharpened-edge use she has not publicly acknowledged
- **teachers_institutions:** none formal; self-directed biofeedback; her mother's family-tradition minimally (her sister has same training)
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY for her species with unusual individual training-depth; body-ownership-of-autonomic-reflex is ORDINARY across sentient species (species-typical biofeedback); her case is depth-unusual within Cluster D
- **body_class_place_shape:** species-typical Cluster D embodiment; the valley-clinic curtained-window place-shape manages ambient accident

### Authentication-consultation at CF-0028 expedition pre-clearance

- **how_learned:** 3 pre-clearance commissions accrued during her valley tenure
- **cost_to_acquire:** pre-clearance documentation + teacher's inherited expedition-consultation correspondence
- **teachers_institutions:** chartered-physician-guild + CF-0028 expedition-syndicate liaison-network
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY for physician-of-valley rank; limited to physical examination / fitness clearance / veterinary for pack animals; NOT artifact-authentication (that's CF-0021 niche, not hers)
- **body_class_place_shape:** species-neutral skill

### Valley-custom dispute-mediation (informal)

- **how_learned:** accrued through 14 years of physician-visibility; her predecessor's custom
- **cost_to_acquire:** low explicit; high implicit (her visibility and trust carry reputational weight)
- **teachers_institutions:** valley-custom itself
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY for valley-single-physicians in mountain-east
- **body_class_place_shape:** her species-visibility paradoxically grants neutral-outsider mediation authority

## Voice and Perception

**Preferred metaphors:** body-register (pulse, breath, temperature, pressure, threshold, the-vital-sign-register); valley-register (pass-open, pass-closed, thaw, snow-line, stone-wall, first-frost-in-the-kilns-season); avoids metaphor-weight on specific subjects (she would not compare a person to a species; she does not use religious register; she does not use combat register). Her metaphor-restraint is a deliberate professional discipline.

**Rhythm of speech:** quiet-steady-low-tempo; clinical-precise in consultation; slower in private; measured-formal in charter-correspondence; she speaks infrequently.

**Taboo words:** her own fluster-sharpening-experiments (never); the sentient-patient case from 6 years ago (never); the specific mining-estate request-wording this season (she has noted it in her private case-book under a coded entry); the word "magic" applied to her species (species biology per PEOPLES Cluster D).

**What she notices first:** pupil-dilation + respiration-rate (vital-sign register is her default); floor-surface for fall-risk; the patient's companion's posture (Cluster D fluster-ambient-accident awareness); the ambient scent of the room; mining-estate representative's body-language register indicating routine-vs-out-of-routine arrival.

**What she overlooks:** casual social exchange she is not practiced in; her own loneliness; how seldom she is actually asked how she is; her sister's attempts across letters to invite her to the two-valleys-over community.

**Species perception effects:** Cluster D reptilian-heritage thermoregulate-behaviorally (she reads her own body-temperature for consultation-urgency-assessment); fluster-gaze autonomic mechanism at close-range affects small animals (her veterinary work uses this legitimately and non-sharpened); her patterned-scale visibility she has learned to minimize through clothing + spectacles.

## Contradictions and Tensions

The embodiment that helps her patients traps her socially; the skill she has developed by body-ownership she cannot acknowledge publicly without inviting the ethics-audit she has not run on herself; the mining-estate's pressure this season is the external form of a question she was already asking. Her private shame from 6 years ago sits in her clinic-room every time the lived patient passes on the street.

## Likely Story Hooks

- **The mining-estate patron's request this season arrives formally.** The captured outland-band member arrives at the mining-estate in three days. The patron wants the fluster-gaze deployed as "animal-handling." Her refusal costs the retainer contract her pass-closed-season winter-supply depends on.
- **A CF-0028 expedition-team arrives at the pass-opening;** one member shows contamination-signature she did not expect in a pre-clearance exam. Her case-book has no entry matching. She must consult the chartered-extraction-guild by summer-pass-courier and hold the expedition at the valley until the response returns.
- **Her sister Eseri writes with news of Cluster D community pressure two valleys over** (fellow-species expectation she has avoided — the community wants her to attend a summer-quorum regarding the CF-0028 expedition-season's impact on the fellow-basilisk-folk lineage). Atreia's loneliness registers against the species-obligation.
- **An apprentice-candidate applies from the drylands** (Kavar's niece, sent with a brass plaque written in her uncle's hand). Training gates include the fluster-conversation Atreia has not had with anyone. The niece is young enough to be taught the minimum; the teaching at all requires Atreia's own acknowledgment of the sharpened edge.
- **A reform-current clergy (Canon Althea / NCP-0006) corresponds about Cluster D physician charter-standing** — the correspondence becomes a visit during the pass-open season. Althea asks her to testify in a heartland charter-court case about DIS-3 physician-access in civic-courts. Her testifying means her face + fluster in a heartland chamber.
- **The pass closes mid-emergency.** A mining-accident victim needs transport to a drylands-edge barber-surgeon beyond her capacity; the pass has just closed to pack-animal travel; her sharpened-fluster could stabilize the patient for a five-day survival-window until winter-pass-courier returns with a response. The patient is sentient. The ethical question arrives unmediated.
